Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida met with South Korean President Yoon Suk-yeol in Seoul for bilateral talks on semiconductor supply chains. The leaders signed a memorandum of understanding at the Blue House. TSMC founder Morris Chang, speaking at a separate event in Taipei, warned that export controls could fragment the global chip market. Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, attending the G20 summit in Rio de Janeiro, called for reform of the United Nations Security Council.
